name: omarchy_fonts
content:
Fonts 
Omarchy uses JetBrainsMono Nerd Font as both the termina and system font by defaut.
You can change this for the termina through the Stye > Font menu in the Omarchy menu
(Super + Alt + Space).
You can insta other popuar programming fonts via Insta > Stye > Font in the Omarchy
menu.
Fonts · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/94/fonts
